nasb.text: Departing from there, Jesus went along by the Sea of Galilee, and having gone up on the mountain, He was sitting there.

esv.text: Jesus went on from there and walked beside the Sea of Galilee. And he went up on the mountain and sat down there.

cnv.text: 耶穌離開那裡，來到加利利海邊，就上山坐下。

ccb.text: 耶稣离开那里，来到加利利湖边，上了山，在那里坐下。

csbs.text: 耶稣离开那地方，来到加利利湖边，上了山坐在那里。
